hero.title: Free SEO & Web Dev
hero.subtitle: Practitioner-grade checklists, templates, and guides used by our team on every project — now free for you to download and use.

items_list.title: Technical SEO Audit Checklist 2025
items_list.desc: The exact 47-point checklist our SEO team uses on every client site: crawlability, Core Web Vitals, structured data, redirects, duplicate content, and mobile optimization.

items_list.title: Website Launch Checklist: 52 Must-Do Items
items_list.desc: Before you go live — 52 checks covering SEO setup, analytics configuration, security hardening, performance baseline, cross-browser testing, and post-launch monitoring.

items_list.title: Core Web Vitals Fix Checklist: LCP, CLS & INP
items_list.desc: Step-by-step remediation guide for all three Core Web Vitals. Covers image optimization, server response, JavaScript performance, layout stability, and monitoring setup.

items_list.title: Google Ads Account Audit Template
items_list.desc: Structured audit template covering campaign structure, Quality Score optimization, bidding strategy review, negative keyword gaps, audience targeting, and conversion tracking setup.

items_list.title: SEO Content Brief Template
items_list.desc: The exact content brief format our SEO writers use: target keyword analysis, competitor gap mapping, recommended word count, internal link structure, FAQ targets, and schema markup guidance.

items_list.title: Mobile App Planning Guide & Scope Template
items_list.desc: Define your app's scope, platform strategy, MVP feature set, technology stack, and budget range before your first developer conversation. Includes cost estimator framework.

items_list.title: Local SEO 90-Day Action Plan
items_list.desc: Week-by-week action plan to build Local Pack presence in 90 days: GBP optimization, citation audit and fix, review generation workflow, and local content calendar template.

items_list.title: E-Commerce CRO Checklist: 45 Conversion Killers
items_list.desc: Systematically identify and fix the checkout friction, trust signal gaps, and UX issues that are costing you conversions. Used on every e-commerce audit we conduct.

ctaSection.title: Need a Custom Audit?
ctaSection.subtitle: Our team applies these checklists to your specific website and delivers a prioritized action plan with estimated impact for each recommendation.

partnership.title: Link to This Page
partnership.subtitle: Are you a blogger, educator, or tool creator? We welcome links to our free resources. If you find our checklists useful, feel free to reference them in your own content — no permission needed.
